title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.480 - Uniformity of construction
text:
217.480.  Uniformity of construction. — Sections 217.450 to 217.485 shall be so construed as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the law of those states which enact it.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 84, A.L. 1983 H.B. 713 Revision)
